title: Tokyo After Dark
subtitle: Neon streets, quiet mornings, and a week of wandering with no hard edges.
description: A photo-driven city diary stitched together from late-night arrivals, neighborhood walks, train rides, and the small rituals that make Tokyo feel cinematic.
intro: This journal leans into texture over checklist travel. It keeps the stations, streets, snacks, and detours that gave the trip its mood.

days.title: Arrival, Ueno, and the first long walk
days.note: The trip begins in transit and settles into the city slowly, with enough room to notice signage, station light, and the feeling of finally being here.

stops.title: Narita to the city
description: Airport transfer, ticket counters, and the first train rhythm of the trip.
A good first-day reminder that Tokyo reveals itself through movement as much as destinations.

stops.title: Ueno arrival
description: Bags down, camera up, and the neighborhood becomes the first chapter.
Street edges, station exits, and convenience store light set the tone for the week.

stops.title: Evening walk
description: No agenda beyond staying outside long enough to let the city feel familiar.

days.title: Day trip energy and coastal air
days.note: A shift away from the dense city grid. The pace opens up and the day reads more like a sequence of scenes than a route.

stops.title: Train out of Tokyo
description: Early departure, quieter platforms, and the pleasure of watching the city loosen at the edges.

stops.title: Temple and town streets
description: A slower architectural rhythm, smaller roads, and places that reward lingering.

stops.title: Lunch stop
description: A reset in the middle of the day, shaped more by atmosphere than efficiency.

days.title: Coffee, culture, and browsing
days.note: A day built from interior spaces, favorite corners, and the kind of stops that make a city feel personal.

stops.title: Morning cafe
description: Coffee first, then a soft start into the day.

stops.title: Museum or gallery window
description: A concentrated pause before slipping back into the street.

stops.title: Anime and bookstore browsing
description: The pleasure of shelves, packaging, and discovering what catches the eye.

days.title: Weather turns and the city glows
days.note: The visual language changes once the light drops. Reflections, signage, and storefront spill become the subject.

stops.title: Train interchange
description: A small transit puzzle, solved one sign and one escalator at a time.

stops.title: Street photography loop
description: Rain or shine, the city is at its best when it reflects itself back.

days.title: Viewpoints and playful detours
days.note: The day moves between elevated views and very grounded details, which is part of Tokyo's charm.

stops.title: Observation point
description: Big-picture city scale, then back down into neighborhood texture.

stops.title: Arcade or shopping floor
description: Bright interiors and a little controlled chaos.

days.title: A quieter morning, a brighter night
days.note: The trip is settled enough now that the day can stay open. Those are often the best travel days.

stops.title: Neighborhood breakfast
description: Simple, local, and easy to remember later.

stops.title: Free-form wandering
description: The route matters less than the mood, so the camera leads.

days.title: Shopping streets and final pickups
days.note: A practical day that still leaves room for atmosphere, people-watching, and one more favorite stop.

stops.title: Department store circuit
description: Last souvenirs, last impulse buys, last chances to compare floors.

stops.title: Dinner reservation
description: A more intentional meal to anchor the final evening.

days.title: Final walk and departure
days.note: The last day keeps things light: one more walk, one more photo, then the long pull back toward the airport.

stops.title: Morning loop
description: A farewell lap through a now-familiar patch of city.

stops.title: Airport return
description: The trip ends the same way it started: in motion.
